title: Perry´s Decorations
description: A Small Vanilla+ Deco Mod! [discontinued for now]
body:
# Perry´s Decorations Mod
## discontinued for now


![( ! !This image contains blocks from other mods! !)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e98584782566f65d706f08c039d65454895d734.png)

( ! !This image contains blocks from other mods! !)



The goal of this mod is to add special decorative blocks as t
here are enough mods that add the basics like chairs and tables!



this mod works good with the
[Another Furniture Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/another-furniture)



This mod Adds:
- Small & Large Plank Pile
- Small & Large Paper stack
- Small & Large Book stack
- Red, Blue, Green, yellow, purple Placable Books
- Open Book
- 3 Firewood Piles
- Lumber Stack
- Straw Bale
- Sealed Barrel
- Big Map (Placeable)
- Table Lamp
- Storm Lantern
- Radio
